title: Irish Beetroot Gratin
description: A delicious Irish-inspired beetroot gratin dish that combines the earthy sweetness of beets with the richness of Irish cheese.
instructions: 2. Peel and slice the beetroot into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
3. In a large bowl, combine the grated cheese, cream, garlic, butter, thyme, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the sliced beetroot to the bowl and toss to coat with the cheese mixture.
5. Transfer the beetroot mixture to a gratin dish and top with additional grated cheese.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the beets are tender.
7. Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
